item.title: Spring Cleaning on the Farm
item.description: See how spring cleaning is done on the farm, including equipment maintenance, organization, and preparation for a productive season ahead.

media:content.media:title: Spring Cleaning on the Farm
media:content.media:description: See how spring cleaning is done on the farm, including equipment maintenance, organization, and preparation for a productive season ahead.

item.title: Evaluating the New Farm Team Member
item.description: Watch the assessment of a new farm team member, highlighting performance, training, and decision-making in maintaining an effective and skilled farm workforce.

media:content.media:title: Evaluating the New Farm Team Member
media:content.media:description: Watch the assessment of a new farm team member, highlighting performance, training, and decision-making in maintaining an effective and skilled farm workforce.

item.title: Sprayers Head into the Field
item.description: See farm sprayers in action as they move into the field, showcasing equipment operation, coverage techniques, and preparation for efficient crop management.

media:content.media:title: Sprayers Head into the Field
media:content.media:description: See farm sprayers in action as they move into the field, showcasing equipment operation, coverage techniques, and preparation for efficient crop management.

item.title: This Should Leave Our Life
item.description: Watch as we remove or fix a persistent problem, showing the process and relief of finally getting rid of something that’s been a challenge.

media:content.media:title: This Should Leave Our Life
media:content.media:description: Watch as we remove or fix a persistent problem, showing the process and relief of finally getting rid of something that’s been a challenge.

item.title: Sold: Big Mack Hits the Road
item.description: Watch as the Big Mack truck is sold and makes its journey down the road, capturing the process and excitement of moving a heavy vehicle.

media:content.media:title: Sold: Big Mack Hits the Road
media:content.media:description: Watch as the Big Mack truck is sold and makes its journey down the road, capturing the process and excitement of moving a heavy vehicle.

item.title: Framing Almost Complete: Farm or Lake House?
item.description: See the near-complete framing of our new build and decide—will it be a cozy farmhouse or a serene lake house? Explore the structure and design choices.

media:content.media:title: Framing Almost Complete: Farm or Lake House?
media:content.media:description: See the near-complete framing of our new build and decide—will it be a cozy farmhouse or a serene lake house? Explore the structure and design choices.

item.title: If Not One Problem, Then 18 More
item.description: A look at tackling multiple issues at once, showing the challenges, problem-solving, and persistence needed when things don’t go as planned.

media:content.media:title: If Not One Problem, Then 18 More
media:content.media:description: A look at tackling multiple issues at once, showing the challenges, problem-solving, and persistence needed when things don’t go as planned.

item.title: Grandpa’s Truck Broke: Dougo’s Fault?
item.description: Grandpa’s truck won’t start, and he blames Dougo! Watch the investigation and reactions as we figure out what really caused the breakdown.

media:content.media:title: Grandpa’s Truck Broke: Dougo’s Fault?
media:content.media:description: Grandpa’s truck won’t start, and he blames Dougo! Watch the investigation and reactions as we figure out what really caused the breakdown.

item.title: Planting Date Is Crucial
item.description: Learn why the planting date is so important, and how timing affects crop growth, yield, and overall farm productivity.

media:content.media:title: Planting Date Is Crucial
media:content.media:description: Learn why the planting date is so important, and how timing affects crop growth, yield, and overall farm productivity.
